text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I spot Ikuno Dictus talking with a<n>fellow student
at the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...Ergo, it would be best for you to<n>reduce the
number of exercises in<n>your afternoon training
session by<n>one.

text_block_list.name: Younger Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I see! That'll definitely work! Thank<n>you, Ikuno!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: No need to thank me. I'm happy to be<n>of service.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The younger Umamusume gives<n>Ikuno Dictus a
deep bow and walks<n>away.
choice_data_list: What were you two talking about?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
She wanted me to look over her<n>training
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm quite good at schedule creation<n>and
management, you see.
choice_data_list: Can you go over mine too?
Can you go over mine too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm quite good at schedule creation<n>and
management, you see.
choice_data_list: Can you go over mine too?
Can you go over mine too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: You want me to look at your schedule<n>too?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
But as a trainer, you must have<n>already learned
about schedule<n>management. There shouldn't be
a<n>need for me to examine it at all.
choice_data_list: I'd just like your opinion is all.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hm... Very well. I'll take a look at it.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...You've included too many activities<n>for this day.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
And while I understand you're busy,<n>you must
find time to eat, sleep, and<n>rest.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Your body is an invaluable asset,<n>even if you
don't use it for racing like<n>us. You should ensure
you are never<n>lacking in nutrition, sleep, or rest.
choice_data_list: Thanks. I'll keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
No need for thanks. I'm merely glad<n>to be of
help.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Now, on to my next point...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I'm not even halfway through my<n>comments. I
cannot simply let you get<n>away with this
ridiculous schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus proceeds to point out<n>each and
every flaw in my schedule...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Tips? Well, if it's one thing I would<n>advise, it
would be not to believe<n>everything you read.
choice_data_list: Do you have a specific example?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Nine times out of ten, the benefits<n>of a
routine are what is emphasized.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Often do I read that running a lot is the<n>key to
strengthen one's legs.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
However, in most cases, schedules<n>do not
account for the fatigue that is<n>brought on by
exercise.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
That's all I wanted to point out. I<n>don't know if it
can be considered a<n>tip, but I hope it helps.
choice_data_list:
Thanks. I'll be careful not to believe everything I
read.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Good. That is wise of you.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: ...Except everything I just said was a<n>lie.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Hehe... I'm joking. What I told you<n>was all true.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
However, it seems you need more<n>practice in
being less gullible.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Ikuno Dictus's stoicism belies a<n>hidden and
unexpected sense of<n>humor. It'll take a great
deal of<n>practice to tell when she's joking.
